tagged_types.name: Abstract_HID_Class
tagged_types.code:
type Abstract_HID_Class (Report_Size : Packet_Size := 1)
is abstract limited new USB_Device_Class with private;

access_types.name: Report_Descriptor_Access
access_types.code: type Report_Descriptor_Access is access constant UInt8_Array;

documentation.description: HID implementations must return an access to their report descriptor

subprograms.name: Ready
subprograms.code: function Ready (This : in out Abstract_HID_Class) return Boolean

documentation.description: The class is ready to send a report

subprograms.name: Report_Descriptor
subprograms.code:
function Report_Descriptor (This : Abstract_HID_Class)
                            return not null Report_Descriptor_Access

documentation.description: HID implementations must return an access to their report descriptor

subprograms.name: Send_Report
subprograms.code:
procedure Send_Report (This : in out Abstract_HID_Class;
                       UDC  : in out USB_Device_Controller'Class)

documentation.description: Send a report to the host

subprograms.name: Set_Report

documentation.description:
Called when the Host sends a Set_Report control transfer. For instance
for LED status on a keyboard.
